description: Template only. Downstream projects must replace every example boundary, path, dependency pattern, and edge rule with project-specific architecture policy before setting template_only to false.
coverage_notes: List which architecture-contract dependency rules this config enforces mechanically.
List any architecture-contract rules that remain docs-only or manual-review-only.

boundaries.notes: Example only. Replace with a project-specific boundary name and path glob.
Example only. Replace with a project-specific boundary name and path glob.

dependency_patterns.notes: Example only. Configure one or more patterns for the project's dependency syntax, or replace this scaffold with a project-specific adapter. The named group must be called target.

allowed_edges.reason: Example only. Replace with a project-specific reason from the generated architecture contract.
allowed_edges.remediation: Example only. Explain how agents should route this dependency when a violation is found.

forbidden_edges.reason: Example only. Replace with a project-specific boundary rule from the generated architecture contract.
forbidden_edges.remediation: Example only. Move the dependency behind an allowed interface, or update the architecture contract and this config if the policy changed.

ignored_dependencies.reason: Example only. Use narrow ignores with a documented reason and owner.
